name: Sovereign Auth Wrapper
description: A highly secure, zero-config auth wrapper for Flutter apps using Riverpod and Hive. Implements auto-logout and encrypted storage.

name: Autonomous Billing Bridge
description: A Stripe integration bridge that auto-generates products and checkouts from prompt commands. Zero manual setup.

name: Proof-of-Truth Logger
description: A high-density logger that signs every log line with a SHA-256 hash for auditability. Essential for Sovereign compliance.
